mapper.insert: INSERT INTO today_task (user_id, task_id, title, target_minutes, accumulated_seconds, done, study_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskId}, #{title}, #{targetMinutes}, #{accumulatedSeconds}, #{done}, #{studyDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE today_task SET title = #{title}, target_minutes = #{targetMinutes}, accumulated_seconds = #{accumulatedSeconds}, done = #{done}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO today_task (user_id, task_id, title, target_minutes, accumulated_seconds, done, study_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskId}, #{title}, #{targetMinutes}, #{accumulatedSeconds}, #{done}, #{studyDate}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), target_minutes = VALUES(target_minutes), accumulated_seconds = VALUES(accumulated_seconds), done = VALUES(done), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM today_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND study_date = #{studyDate}
